differential_diagnoses: Pleomorphic adenoma of minor salivary gland
next_steps: Excisional or wide incisional biopsy of the mass with frozen section analysis
Immunohistochemical staining including desmin, MyoD1, myogenin, and pancytokeratin
Molecular testing including FISH for FOXO1 and NGS for driver mutations
Magnetic resonance imaging of the neck with contrast to better define tumor extent and relationship to the carotid sheath
Systemic staging including PET/CT or chest/abdominal/pelvic CT

differential_diagnoses: Pleomorphic adenoma of minor salivary gland
next_steps: Perform urgent CT angiography or MRI/MRA of the neck to rule out carotid artery pseudoaneurysm prior to any invasive procedure
Secure airway under controlled conditions in the operating room
Perform excisional biopsy under general anesthesia with vascular surgery on standby for potential hemorrhage control
Submit tissue for histopathology with immunohistochemical staining (desmin, MyoD1, myogenin, pancytokeratin, CD138, LCA)
Perform molecular analysis including FISH for FOXO1 and NGS panel
Obtain baseline laboratory studies including CBC, coagulation profile, and serum protein electrophoresis
